categories.title: Bearings
categories.subtitle: HIGH SPEED, ELECTRIC MOTORS, PUMPS
categories.data:
Standard radial clearances: C2, CN, C3, C4. 

C3 is the global standard for electric motors due to thermal expansion. Fits generally require ISO k6 or m6 shaft tolerances.

categories.title: Chains
categories.subtitle: DRIVE SYSTEMS & CONVEYORS
categories.data:
ANSI Sizes: 35 to 240. BS Sizes: 06B to 32B. 

Always check for 'hooking' on sprocket teeth as a sign of wear. Lubrication is essential for chain longevity.

categories.title: Seals
categories.subtitle: FLUID RETENTION & PROTECTION
categories.data:
TC (Double Lip) is the industry standard for keeping oil in and dust out. 

Ensure the garter spring is facing the fluid being retained. Use Viton for high-heat applications.

categories.title: Agri
categories.subtitle: DISC HARROW & HUBS
categories.data:
Specialized sealing for high-contamination environments. 

Features 'Triple-Lip' seals and robust housing units for tillage. Regularly check for hub play in heavy-duty cycles.
